description: This file implements a WebSocket server using Socket.IO for real-time communication in a manufacturing monitoring system. It handles JWT authentication, manages socket connections, listens for specific events from an internal event bus, and maps them to frontend-compatible socket events. Additionally, it provides helper functions to emit KPI, alert, and activity updates to connected clients.

methods.name: extractTokenFromHandshake(handshake)
methods.description: Extracts JWT token from various locations in the handshake object such as auth token, authorization header, or query parameter.

methods.name: buildSocketUserFromJwt(decoded)
methods.description: Builds a socket user object with id, email, name, and role from decoded JWT payload.

methods.name: mapBusEventToSocket(evt)
methods.description: Maps internal event bus events to Socket.IO event names and payloads suitable for frontend updates.

methods.name: createSocketServer({ server, path = "/socket.io" } = {})
methods.description: Creates and configures a Socket.IO server attached to an HTTP server, handling authentication and event forwarding.

methods.name: emitKpiUpdate({ scope = "line", lineId = null, shiftId = null, kpis = {} } = {})
methods.description: Publishes a KPI snapshot event to the internal event bus for real-time dashboards.

methods.name: emitAlertUpdate({ type = "alert.created", alert } = {})
methods.description: Publishes an alert update event to the internal event bus.

methods.name: emitActivityUpdate({ type, entity = null, data = null } = {})
methods.description: Publishes an activity update event (production, downtime, quality, etc.) to the internal event bus.

ctags.name: emitActivityUpdate
ctags.pattern: /^function emitActivityUpdate({ type, entity = null, data = null } = {}) {$/

ctags.name: emitKpiUpdate
ctags.pattern: /^function emitKpiUpdate({ scope = "line", lineId = null, shiftId = null, kpis = {} } = {}) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ scope = "line", lineId = null, shiftId = null, kpis = {} } = {})
